response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the minimum experience threshold (20 years) and holds an MIT CS degree, demonstrating solid technical fundamentals. However, the role explicitly seeks a principal engineer with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms. While his current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, his career has been primarily focused on full-stack software development across web, mobile, and infrastructure—not strategic AI product development. His staff-level roles show technical leadership but lack evidence of director-level strategic partnerships with customers or vision-setting in cloud/AI strategy.
strengths: 20+ years of software engineering experience exceeding the 15-year requirement, with demonstrated work across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and infrastructure
Recent engagement with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol frameworks at re:cinq shows current knowledge of AI tooling and emerging patterns
Founder of GISCollective and active open-source contributor, demonstrating entrepreneurial mindset and ability to drive independent technical vision
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms built; current AI experience is infrastructure and tooling, not the strategic AI product development the role prioritizes
Career primarily focused on full-stack development and engineering craftsmanship rather than strategic cloud/AI platform vision or advising enterprise customers on adoption
Lacks formal AI credentials (no Master's/PhD in AI-related field) and no evidence of being a recognized industry expert in AI strategy or thought leadership through publications or conference talks
